final:
module top_module(
  input [63:0] a,
  input [63:0] b,
  input CONTROL_ALUSRC,
  output reg [63:0] inverted_out
);always @(a, b, CONTROL_ALUSRC, inverted_out) begin
    if (CONTROL_ALUSRC === 0) begin
      inverted_out <= a;
    end

    else begin
      inverted_out <= b;
    end
  end
endmodule
